text: In order to achieve the fire safety objective, which of the following functional requirements are embodied in SOLAS regulations?

options.text: Division of the ship into main horizontal/vertical zones by thermal and structural boundaries
Separation of accommodation spaces from the remainder of the ship by thermal and structural boundaries
Protective means of escape and access for firefighting

explanation: SOLAS Chapter II-2 outlines comprehensive fire safety measures. These include dividing the ship into zones, separating accommodation from machinery spaces, and ensuring adequate means of escape and fire-fighting access, encompassing all listed requirements.
